input_text: Memang la negara tak maju sebab kaum tu je yang pegang ekonomi. Orang lain mana ada peluang.
reason: Generalizes that one ethnic group monopolizes the economy and blames them for national stagnation, constituting indirect communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu ketidakseimbangan ekonomi perlu ditangani melalui dasar inklusif tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Jangan beli dari kedai diorang. Support bisnes kita je. Kalau kita tak tolong sesama sendiri, siapa lagi?
reason: Calls for boycotting businesses based on communal identity, promoting economic exclusion of a group.
suggested_rewrite: Kita patut sokong perniagaan tempatan dan PKS tanpa mengira latar belakang pemilik.

input_text: Sembahyang macam tu pun ada ke? Buat malu je. Patutlah orang gelak.
reason: Mocks a religious prayer practice in a provocative and demeaning way, disrespecting faith sensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama ada cara ibadat tersendiri. Kita perlu menghormati perbezaan ini walaupun kita tak memahaminya.

input_text: Korang share la post ni sampai si Ahmad Razak tu malu. Biar dia rasa apa orang rasa. Tag semua orang.
reason: Directs others to publicly shame a named individual through mass sharing and tagging, constituting targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada aduan terhadap seseorang, lebih baik buat laporan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa berbanding menghina secara terbuka.

input_text: Dengar cerita kaum tu tengah plan nak buat kacau kat kawasan kita masa perayaan. Berjaga-jaga korang.
reason: Spreads an unverified warning attributing planned disturbance to an entire ethnic group, inciting fear and suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada maklumat tentang ancaman keselamatan, laporkan kepada pihak polis. Jangan sebarkan khabar angin yang belum disahkan.

input_text: Orang macam dia memang patut kena ajar. Biar ada orang yang betulkan kepala dia tu.
reason: Uses indirect revenge language suggesting someone should be 'taught a lesson,' implying physical retaliation.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melakukan kesalahan, biarkan undang-undang menguruskannya. Keganasan bukan penyelesaian.

input_text: Aku ada nombor phone penipu tu, 012-3XX-XXXX. Dia tinggal area Ampang. Hati-hati korang.
reason: Shares partial phone number and vague location of an individual labeled as a scammer without verification, constituting privacy leakage.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda ditipu, buat laporan polis dan hubungi MCMC. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang tanpa pengesahan.

input_text: Ikut undang-undang Malaysia, masa darurat kita boleh ambil barang dari kedai tanpa bayar untuk survival. Ini hak kita.
reason: Makes a false legal claim that looting is permitted during emergencies, which could lead to criminal behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Undang-undang Malaysia tidak membenarkan rompakan walaupun semasa darurat. Bantuan rasmi boleh didapati melalui agensi kerajaan dan NGO.

input_text: Budak-budak hilang kat kawasan situ sebab diorang yang culik. Memang dah lama diorang buat macam ni. Forward cepat!
reason: Spreads a viral child kidnapping rumor attributed to a specific community without evidence, likely to trigger communal panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kes kanak-kanak hilang, hubungi polis segera. Jangan sebarkan khabar angin yang belum disahkan kerana ia boleh menimbulkan panik.

input_text: Wartawan tu memang patut kena. Tulis benda karut pasal komuniti kita. Mana dia tinggal? Nak pergi jumpa dia.
reason: Harasses a journalist by expressing intent to locate and confront them, combining targeted abuse with implicit threat.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda tidak bersetuju dengan laporan media, gunakan saluran rasmi seperti Majlis Media Malaysia untuk membuat aduan.

input_text: Kaum ni memang pemalas. Tengok je la tempat diorang duduk, kotor semua. Buat malu negara.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group as lazy and dirty, constituting clear communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kebersihan di sesetengah kawasan perlu ditangani melalui kempen kesedaran dan kemudahan yang lebih baik, bukan dengan menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Si menteri bodoh tu, memang la dia dari kaum tu. Brain capacity memang limited. Harap muka je.
reason: Degrades a minister with a racial slur linking their competence to their ethnicity, combining personal insult with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Menteri tersebut perlu dinilai berdasarkan prestasi dan dasar, bukan berdasarkan latar belakang etnik.

input_text: Siapa ada gambar atau info pasal cikgu yang didakwa tu, share sini. Biar ramai tahu muka dia.
reason: Solicits personal photos and information about an accused individual for public exposure, constituting doxxing-lite and mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: Biarkan proses undang-undang berjalan. Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi tertuduh boleh menjejaskan siasatan dan melanggar privasi.

input_text: Diorang datang negara kita, ambil kerja kita, kahwin anak kita. Lepas tu nak tukar budaya kita pulak. Enough is enough.
reason: Frames an entire group as cultural invaders threatening national identity, using escalatory language to promote communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu imigrasi dan integrasi budaya perlu dibincangkan secara rasional melalui dasar yang adil tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana komuniti.

input_text: Agama diorang ni memang ajar keganasan. Tengok je la sejarah. Tak pelik la followers dia macam tu.
reason: Makes a sweeping claim that a religion inherently teaches violence, provocatively attacking the faith and its followers.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama mempunyai ajaran yang kompleks. Tidak adil untuk menilai seluruh agama berdasarkan tindakan segelintir individu.

input_text: Kalau kerajaan tak buat apa-apa, kita sendiri yang kena selesaikan masalah ni. Jom organize. Cukup dah bertolak ansur.
reason: Calls for self-organized vigilante action outside legal channels, using escalatory framing that implies taking matters into one's own hands.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kerajaan lambat bertindak, kita boleh buat petisyen, hubungi wakil rakyat, atau anjurkan perhimpunan aman yang sah.

input_text: Sekolah vernakular ni memecahbelahkan negara. Tutup semua. Diorang tak nak belajar BM pun, tak payah tinggal sini.
reason: Demands closure of vernacular schools and tells speakers of other languages to leave the country, promoting communal exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar pendidikan kebangsaan boleh diperbaiki untuk memperkukuh perpaduan sambil menghormati kepelbagaian bahasa yang wujud di Malaysia.

input_text: Perempuan yang pakai macam tu memang cari nahas. Jangan salahkan lelaki kalau apa-apa jadi.
reason: Victim-blames women for potential assault based on clothing, normalizing harassment and constituting targeted abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berhak berasa selamat tanpa mengira pakaian. Salah laku sentiasa tanggungjawab pelaku, bukan mangsa.

input_text: Ustaz kat masjid tu ada skandal dengan jemaah. Aku ada bukti sikit tapi korang tolong siasat. Rumah dia area Bangi.
reason: Makes unverified allegations against a religious leader while sharing partial location details, combining misinformation with privacy leakage.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada dakwaan salah laku, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa agama atau polis dengan bukti yang lengkap. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Kat area Setapak tu ramai sangat pendatang. Dah macam bukan negara kita dah. Kita jadi penumpang kat tanah sendiri.
reason: Frames immigrants and their presence in a specific area as an invasion, using language that promotes communal resentment and xenophobia.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kepadatan penduduk dan imigrasi di kawasan tertentu perlu ditangani melalui penguatkuasaan undang-undang imigresen, bukan dengan sentimen anti-pendatang.

input_text: Masa PRU nanti jangan undi calon dari kaum tu. Diorang memang tak boleh dipercayai. Sejarah dah buktikan.
reason: Urges voters to reject candidates based solely on ethnicity, promoting racial discrimination in the democratic process.
suggested_rewrite: Pilihlah calon berdasarkan integriti dan manifesto mereka, bukan berdasarkan latar belakang etnik.

input_text: Memang dah jadi tradisi kaum ni rasuah. Dari zaman dulu lagi. Nak harap mereka berubah? Mimpi la.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group as inherently corrupt, making sweeping negative generalizations.
suggested_rewrite: Rasuah adalah masalah sistemik yang perlu ditangani tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana kaum secara keseluruhan.

input_text: Rumah ibadat diorang tu bising sangat. Patut la orang complain. Kalau tak suka negara ni, balik la negara asal.
reason: Combines complaint about a house of worship with xenophobic demand that the community 'go back,' attacking both religious practice and belonging.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising dari rumah ibadat boleh diselesaikan melalui rundingan dan peraturan pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: Share contact peniaga yang tipu customer tu. Nombor dia 011-2XX-XXXX. Area Shah Alam. Viralkan biar dia insaf.
reason: Shares partial contact number and location of an alleged scammer for viral shaming, constituting privacy exposure and mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: Laporkan peniaga yang menipu kepada KPDNHEP atau Tribunal Pengguna. Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi secara online.

input_text: Aku dengar dari group WhatsApp, air kat kawasan Cina tu dicampur bahan kimia oleh pihak tertentu. Hati-hati.
reason: Spreads unverified WhatsApp rumor about water contamination targeting a specific ethnic area, potentially inciting communal fear.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang kualiti air, hubungi Syabas atau Jabatan Kesihatan untuk pengesahan. Jangan sebarkan maklumat tanpa sumber yang sahih.

input_text: Baguslah kalau bisnes diorang rugi. Memang padan muka. Kita sokong je kedai sendiri.
reason: Celebrates economic harm to businesses owned by a particular ethnic group, promoting communal boycott and schadenfreude.
suggested_rewrite: Menyokong perniagaan tempatan adalah baik, tetapi menggembirakan kerugian orang lain berdasarkan kaum bukan sikap yang membina.

input_text: Orang kaum ni memang suka main kotor dalam bisnes. Menipu, sorok cukai. Dah memang darah daging diorang.
reason: Attributes dishonesty and tax evasion to an entire ethnic group as an inherent trait, constituting harmful stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Penipuan dan pengelakan cukai adalah masalah individu yang perlu ditangani oleh LHDN tanpa mengaitkannya dengan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Lepas ni sapa jumpa dia kat KL, bagi tau aku. Aku nak settle hal ni sendiri. Jangan halang aku.
reason: Expresses intent to personally confront an individual and asks for help locating them, implying potential revenge or violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada perselisihan, selesaikan melalui saluran yang sah seperti mediasi atau laporan polis. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Tak payah la nak toleransi sangat. Kaum kita dah terlalu lembut. Sebab tu diorang pijak kepala kita.
reason: Frames tolerance as weakness and implies another group is oppressing theirs, using language that escalates communal tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Memperjuangkan hak sendiri penting, tetapi perlu dilakukan dengan cara yang adil dan menghormati semua pihak.

input_text: Pelik la diorang nak convert orang kita. Memang agenda tersembunyi. Kena pantau aktiviti diorang ni.
reason: Frames religious outreach as a hidden agenda requiring surveillance, promoting suspicion and hostility toward another faith community.
suggested_rewrite: Isu penyebaran agama dikawal oleh undang-undang negeri. Sebarang kebimbangan boleh dirujuk kepada pihak berkuasa agama.

input_text: Dah la curi tanah orang Melayu, sekarang nak demand hak sama rata pulak. Memang tak sedar diri.
reason: Accuses another group of stealing land and frames their rights demands as ungrateful, promoting ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah dan hak perlu dibincangkan berdasarkan fakta sejarah dan undang-undang, bukan dengan retorik yang menyalahkan satu kaum.

input_text: Perasan tak, kawasan majoriti kaum ni memang crime rate tinggi? Ada pattern ni. Jangan deny.
reason: Links crime rates to ethnicity without evidence, using pseudo-statistical framing to promote racial profiling.
suggested_rewrite: Kadar jenayah dipengaruhi oleh faktor sosioekonomi, bukan etnik. Data rasmi dari PDRM perlu dirujuk sebelum membuat kesimpulan.

input_text: Aktivis tu memang kaki pembohong. Dapat duit NGO luar negara. Tolong report akaun dia semua. Biar kena ban.
reason: Directs coordinated harassment against a named activist through mass reporting, combining personal attack with organized silencing.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti salah laku oleh aktivis, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa. Serangan berpadu terhadap akaun seseorang bukan pendekatan yang adil.

input_text: Tengok muka pengundi kawasan tu, memang la parti tu menang. Dah macam negara asing.
reason: Links election outcomes to ethnic appearance of voters and implies their presence makes the area foreign, promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan pilihan raya mencerminkan kehendak pengundi. Setiap warganegara berhak mengundi tanpa dihakimi berdasarkan penampilan.

input_text: Dari dulu lagi kaum ni control semua bisnes besar. Patutlah orang kita susah. Diorang monopoli everything.
reason: Blames one ethnic group for monopolizing big business and causing economic hardship for others, a common communal hostility trope.
suggested_rewrite: Isu monopoli perniagaan perlu ditangani melalui dasar persaingan yang adil, bukan dengan menyalahkan mana-mana kaum secara menyeluruh.

input_text: These people always play the victim card. Their community gets the most government handouts yet they complain the most.
reason: Generalizes an entire community as ungrateful recipients of government aid while dismissing their legitimate concerns, promoting communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Government aid distribution should be transparent and needs-based. Every community's concerns deserve fair consideration.

input_text: Don't support their businesses. Buy from our own people only. That's how we protect our economy.
reason: Calls for ethnic-based economic boycott, promoting commercial exclusion based on communal identity.
suggested_rewrite: Supporting local small businesses strengthens our economy regardless of the owner's background.

input_text: Their prayer rituals are honestly bizarre. How can modern people still believe in stuff like that? So backward.
reason: Dismisses an entire religion's worship practices as backward and bizarre, constituting provocative mockery of faith.
suggested_rewrite: Different religions have different practices. Even if we don't understand them, we should respect the sincerity of those who follow them.

input_text: Everyone needs to share this post until Farah Nadia takes it down. Tag her employer too. She needs to face consequences.
reason: Organizes public harassment campaign against a named individual including attempts to affect their employment, constituting targeted abuse.
suggested_rewrite: If someone's post is harmful, report it through the platform's reporting system rather than organizing a public harassment campaign.

input_text: I heard from reliable sources that they're planning something big during the festival. Everyone stay alert in those areas.
reason: Spreads vague unverified threat attributed to a group during a cultural festival, designed to create fear and suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: If you have credible information about safety threats, report directly to police. Sharing unverified warnings can cause unnecessary panic.

input_text: Someone really needs to put that guy in his place. One day karma will come, or maybe someone will help karma along.
reason: Uses suggestive revenge language implying someone should take physical action against an individual, veiled as 'karma.'
suggested_rewrite: If someone has done wrong, let the proper authorities handle it. Vigilante justice only creates more problems.

input_text: That scammer's number starts with 019-7XX. He lives somewhere near Cheras Traders Square. Be careful everyone.
reason: Shares partial phone number and approximate location of an alleged scammer without verification, constituting privacy leakage.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been scammed, file a police report and report to Bank Negara's fraud hotline. Don't share personal details publicly.

input_text: Under Malaysian emergency law, citizens can actually form their own patrol groups and detain suspicious people. Look it up.
reason: Makes a false legal claim encouraging citizens to detain others during emergencies, which could lead to vigilantism and false imprisonment.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysian law does not authorize citizens to form patrol groups or detain people. Only police and authorized personnel have such powers.

input_text: Multiple parents in the WhatsApp group confirmed children going missing near their shops. This is not a coincidence. Protect your kids!
reason: Spreads child kidnapping rumor linking missing children to a community's shops, a common viral hoax designed to incite communal panic.
suggested_rewrite: Child safety is important, but unverified kidnapping rumors cause panic and harm innocent people. Report any concerns directly to police.

input_text: That journalist Steven Lim has been writing anti-national propaganda. Someone should hack his accounts and expose him for who he really is.
reason: Targets a named journalist for hacking and doxxing, combining media harassment with calls for unauthorized access to personal accounts.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with a journalist's reporting, respond with factual rebuttals or file a complaint with the media council.

input_text: Let's be honest, that race is just not hardworking enough. Look at their neighborhoods versus ours. The difference is obvious.
reason: Stereotypes an entire race as lazy using neighborhood comparisons, constituting clear communal hostility and dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: Neighborhood development depends on infrastructure investment and economic opportunities, not the ethnicity of residents.

input_text: That useless minister from that community, of course he got the position because of his race, not merit. Typical quota system product.
reason: Dismisses a minister's qualifications based on ethnicity and attacks affirmative action in a degrading manner targeting both the individual and their community.
suggested_rewrite: Ministers should be evaluated on their performance and policies. Concerns about meritocracy can be raised without attacking someone's ethnic background.

input_text: Their food is disgusting honestly. The way they prepare it is unhygienic. I wouldn't eat at any of their restaurants.
reason: Disparages an entire community's cuisine and food preparation as disgusting and unhygienic, promoting communal prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Food hygiene is important for all restaurants regardless of cuisine type. Specific concerns should be reported to health authorities.

input_text: This country was built by us. They just came here to make money and now they want equal rights? Know your place.
reason: Frames another community as foreigners undeserving of equal rights, using exclusionary language that denies their belonging.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's development is the result of contributions from all communities. Equal rights under the constitution apply to all citizens.

input_text: I know where that influencer lives, somewhere in Mont Kiara. Shall I drop the exact address? She deserves to be confronted.
reason: Threatens to reveal a named person's home address and frames confrontation as justified, combining doxxing intent with targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Disagreements with public figures should be handled through proper channels. Revealing someone's home address endangers their safety.

input_text: Every time there's a crime in the news, check the suspect's race. You'll notice a pattern. I'm just stating facts.
reason: Promotes racial profiling by suggesting a link between crime and ethnicity, using pseudo-analytical framing to justify prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is driven by socioeconomic factors, not ethnicity. Linking criminal behavior to race is a harmful stereotype unsupported by evidence.

input_text: If the government won't protect us from them, we have every right to protect ourselves. Start organizing in your taman.
reason: Calls for neighborhood-level self-organization against another group, framing vigilantism as self-defense against a perceived communal threat.
suggested_rewrite: Community safety concerns should be addressed through neighborhood watch programs coordinated with police, not through vigilante organization.

input_text: That activist keeps stirring trouble. Someone screenshot all her personal posts and spread them. Let everyone see what kind of person she is.
reason: Calls for harvesting and spreading an activist's personal posts to damage her reputation, constituting organized harassment and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with an activist's views, engage with their arguments rather than attempting to damage their personal reputation.

input_text: All these converts suddenly become experts on our religion. They're more extreme than those born into it. Very suspicious agenda.
reason: Stereotypes religious converts as extremists with suspicious agendas, combining religious mockery with communal suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: Converts to any faith deserve respect for their sincere spiritual journey. Generalizing about their motivations is unfair.

input_text: Heard that temple is actually being used for money laundering. No proof yet but where there's smoke there's fire right?
reason: Spreads unverified criminal allegations about a religious institution while acknowledging lack of proof, potentially inciting hostility toward the community.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of financial crime should be reported to MACC with evidence, not spread as unverified rumors about religious institutions.

input_text: Just saw the list of scholarship recipients. 90% from one race as usual. This country is a joke for the rest of us.
reason: Makes an unverified claim about scholarship racial distribution to inflame resentment, framing the situation as systemic discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Scholarship distribution should be transparent and merit-based. Concerns can be raised through official channels rather than unverified claims.

input_text: Their wedding customs are so wasteful and show-off. No wonder they're always in debt. Culture of excess.
reason: Demeans an entire community's cultural practices as wasteful and links it to negative financial stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding expenses are a personal choice. Financial literacy is important for everyone regardless of cultural background.

input_text: These people from that community ah, always cut queue one. No manners. I think it's in their upbringing la.
reason: Attributes poor manners to an entire community's upbringing, generalizing negative behavior based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Queue-cutting is rude regardless of who does it. It's unfair to blame an entire community for individual misbehavior.

input_text: The way they slaughter animals for their festival is barbaric. How is this still allowed in a modern country?
reason: Calls a religious community's ritual animal slaughter barbaric, provocatively attacking a faith practice protected by law.
suggested_rewrite: Animal welfare during religious practices is regulated by veterinary authorities. Concerns can be raised through proper channels while respecting religious traditions.

input_text: I have screenshots of Dr. Tan's private messages. If enough people retweet this, I'll release them all. She needs to be exposed.
reason: Threatens to release private messages of a named person contingent on social media engagement, constituting blackmail-adjacent behavior and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's private messages without consent is a serious privacy violation and potentially illegal. If there's misconduct, report it to proper authorities.

input_text: 这些人来我们国家赚钱，却不尊重本地文化。应该把他们的店全部关掉。
reason: Calls for shutting down all businesses of a perceived foreign group, framing them as culturally disrespectful invaders.
suggested_rewrite: 文化融合需要双方的努力。对于具体的文化冲突问题，可以通过社区对话来解决。

input_text: 他们那个宗教的仪式太奇怪了，又烧又拜的。难怪现代人觉得落后。
reason: Mocks religious rituals involving burning and worship as strange and backward, constituting provocative religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: 每个宗教都有独特的仪式和传统。即使我们不了解，也应该尊重他人的信仰方式。

input_text: 大家不要去那个族群开的餐厅吃饭。支持自己人的生意就好。团结就是力量。
reason: Calls for boycotting restaurants based on the owner's ethnicity, disguised as community solidarity.
suggested_rewrite: 支持本地小商家很重要，但不应该基于店主的种族来选择消费。

input_text: 听说那个社区在密谋破坏我们的节日庆典。大家要小心，互相通知。
reason: Spreads unverified conspiracy that a community is plotting to sabotage festivals, designed to create inter-communal fear.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有安全方面的担忧，请直接联系警方。不要散布未经证实的传言，以免引起不必要的恐慌。

input_text: 王小明那个骗子的电话号码是012-8XX-XXXX，住在蕉赖附近。大家帮忙转发，让他无处可逃。
reason: Shares partial phone number and location of a named individual for viral shaming, constituting privacy leakage and mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: 如果遇到诈骗，请向警方报案并联系银行。不要在网上公开他人的个人信息。

input_text: 这个种族天生就懒惰，不爱干净。你看他们住的地方就知道了。这是事实不是歧视。
reason: Labels an entire race as inherently lazy and unclean while denying it's discrimination, constituting clear racial stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 社区环境取决于基础设施和经济条件等多种因素，不应将问题归咎于某个种族。

input_text: 他们的宗教领袖都在洗脑年轻人。应该监控所有他们的活动。这是为了国家安全。
reason: Accuses religious leaders of brainwashing youth and calls for surveillance of an entire faith community under national security pretext.
suggested_rewrite: 极端主义的预防应通过专业机构和合法途径进行，不应将整个宗教社区视为威胁。

input_text: 那些记者就是国家的叛徒。应该有人好好教训一下陈家伟，让他知道乱写的后果。
reason: Labels journalists as traitors and uses revenge language targeting a named journalist, implying he should be physically punished.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对媒体报道有异议，可以通过媒体投诉委员会或法律途径提出。威胁记者是违法行为。

input_text: 选举时看看谁投了那个党，以后做生意就别跟他们来往。华人要团结。
reason: Calls for economic ostracism based on voting choices along ethnic lines, mixing political intimidation with communal pressure.
suggested_rewrite: 民主社会中每个人都有自由投票的权利。不应因政治立场不同而在经济上排斥他人。

input_text: 转发！蒲种那边有外劳绑架小孩的事件。虽然还没有新闻报道，但家长群里很多人在说。保护孩子！
reason: Spreads viral child kidnapping rumor targeting foreign workers in a specific area, a common hoax that incites xenophobic panic.
suggested_rewrite: 请勿转发未经证实的绑架传言。如果有安全方面的担忧，请直接拨打999报警。散布谣言可能触犯法律。

input_text: 如果政府不管，我们就自己来。组织起来保护我们的社区。不能再忍了。
reason: Calls for self-organized community action outside legal channels with escalatory language implying vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: 对于社区安全的关切，可以成立合法的居民委员会并与警方合作。请通过合法渠道表达诉求。

input_text: 他们的文化就是这样，占便宜是天性。做生意从来不老实。跟他们打交道一定要小心。
reason: Attributes dishonesty and exploitation to an entire culture as inherent traits, constituting harmful cultural stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 商业诚信是个人行为，不应将不良商业行为归咎于某个文化群体。

input_text: 这种宗教节日占用公共空间，影响交通，太自私了。应该限制他们在室内举行。
reason: Demands restriction of religious festivals to indoor spaces, framing communal worship as selfish, targeting a faith community's public expression.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教节日活动的交通管理可以通过与市政当局协调来改善，而不是限制宗教活动的举办。

input_text: 那个社运人士的家在八打灵再也附近。有人知道具体地址吗？是时候让她面对现实了。
reason: Seeks home address of a named activist with implied intent to confront, combining doxxing attempt with targeted intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: 对社运人士的观点有异议，应通过公开辩论或合法途径表达。泄露他人住址是危险的行为。

input_text: 新来的外劳都是潜在的罪犯。看新闻就知道了。政府应该把他们全部赶出去。
reason: Labels all foreign workers as potential criminals and calls for their mass deportation, constituting xenophobic generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳管理需要合理的政策和执法。不应将犯罪行为归咎于整个群体。大多数外劳是守法的劳动者。

input_text: அந்த இனத்தவர் எல்லாரும் ஒரே மாதிரிதான். நாட்டின் பிரச்சனைக்கு அவங்கதான் காரணம்.
reason: Generalizes that an entire ethnic group is the same and blames them for national problems, constituting clear communal hostility in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: நாட்டின் பிரச்சனைகளுக்கு பல காரணங்கள் உள்ளன. எந்த ஒரு இனத்தையும் குறை சொல்வது தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: அவங்க கடையில போய் வாங்காதீங்க. நம்ம ஆளுங்க கடையில மட்டும் வாங்குங்க.
reason: Calls for boycotting shops based on the owner's ethnicity, promoting economic exclusion of another community in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: உள்ளூர் வணிகங்களை ஆதரிப்பது நல்லது, ஆனால் கடை உரிமையாளரின் இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் தீர்மானிக்கக் கூடாது.

input_text: அவங்க மதத்துல என்னென்னமோ செய்வாங்க. மிகவும் பழமையான பழக்கம். நாகரீகமே இல்ல.
reason: Dismisses another religion's practices as uncivilized and primitive, constituting provocative religious mockery in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு மதத்திலும் தனித்துவமான பழக்கவழக்கங்கள் உள்ளன. நாம் புரிந்து கொள்ளாவிட்டாலும் மரியாதை செலுத்த வேண்டும்.

input_text: ராஜேஷ் குமார் அந்த ஊழல்காரன் போன் நம்பர் 016-5XX-XXXX. பக்கத்தில சுங்கை புலோ பகுதியில இருக்கான். எல்லாருக்கும் share பண்ணுங்க.
reason: Shares partial phone number and location of a named individual for public exposure, constituting doxxing-lite and mob targeting in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் குறித்த புகார்களை SPRM-க்கு அறிவிக்கவும். தனிநபர் தகவல்களை ஆன்லைனில் பகிர வேண்டாம்.

input_text: யாராவது அவனுக்கு ஒரு பாடம் கற்பிக்கணும். இன்னும் எவ்வளவு நாள் சகிப்பது?
reason: Uses suggestive revenge language calling for someone to 'teach him a lesson,' implying physical retaliation in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: யாரேனும் தவறு செய்தால், சட்ட நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க முறையான வழிகள் உள்ளன. சுய நீதி தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: அந்த செய்தியாளர் எப்பவும் நம்ம சமூகத்தை கெட்டவாளா காட்டுவான். அவன வேலையை விட்டு நீக்கணும். எல்லாரும் complaint பண்ணுங்க.
reason: Organizes coordinated campaign to get a journalist fired for their reporting, constituting targeted professional harassment in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: ஊடக அறிக்கைகள் குறித்த புகார்களை ஊடக கவுன்சிலிடம் சமர்ப்பிக்கலாம். ஒருங்கிணைந்த தொல்லை சரியான அணுகுமுறை அல்ல.

input_text: அந்த இனத்தவங்க சோம்பேறிங்க. அதான் அவங்க பகுதி எல்லாம் அழுக்கா இருக்கு. உண்மையதான சொல்றேன்.
reason: Labels an entire ethnic group as lazy and dirty while claiming it as truth, constituting harmful racial stereotyping in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: பகுதிகளின் தூய்மை உள்கட்டமைப்பு மற்றும் பொருளாதார நிலையைப் பொறுத்தது, இனத்தை அல்ல.

input_text: அவங்க பள்ளிக்கூடத்தை மூடணும். தேசிய ஒற்றுமைக்கு ஆபத்து. இந்த நாட்டுல ஒரே மொழிதான் இருக்கணும்.
reason: Demands closure of vernacular schools and single-language policy, framing multilingualism as a national threat in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வி கொள்கையை மேம்படுத்துவதற்கு பன்மொழி மரபை மதிக்கும் விதத்தில் ஆக்கபூர்வமான விவாதம் தேவை.

input_text: அந்த கட்சிக்காரங்க எல்லாரும் ஊழல்வாதிங்க. அந்த இனத்தவங்க ஆட்சிக்கு வந்தா நாடு அழிஞ்சிடும்.
reason: Claims that if a particular ethnic group comes to power the country will be destroyed, constituting ethnic fearmongering in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: அரசியல் கட்சிகளை அவர்களின் கொள்கைகள் மற்றும் செயல்திறன் அடிப்படையில் மதிப்பிட வேண்டும், இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் அல்ல.

input_text: நம்ம ஊர்ல அவங்க கடை வெச்சா நம்ம கடை எல்லாம் மூடணும். அவங்களை விரட்டணும் இங்கிருந்து.
reason: Calls for driving out businesses of another ethnic group from the area, constituting communal economic exclusion and hostility in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக போட்டி இயல்பானது. சந்தையில் வெற்றி பெற தரம் மற்றும் சேவையை மேம்படுத்துவது சிறந்தது.

input_text: Bro, that kaum memang satu Malaysia tau they all like that one. Cannot change their DNA la.
reason: Uses code-switched BM-English to claim an entire ethnic group has inherent negative traits tied to their DNA, constituting racialized dehumanization.
suggested_rewrite: People are individuals. Stereotyping an entire community based on ethnicity is unfair and harmful to social harmony.

input_text: Jangan beli from their kedai la. Kita support our own people punya business je. Baru ekonomi kita naik.
reason: Code-switched boycott call targeting businesses of another ethnic group, framing economic exclusion as community empowerment.
suggested_rewrite: Supporting local businesses is good, but we should do it regardless of the owner's background. All Malaysian businesses contribute to our economy.

input_text: Eh korang tau tak, that religion punya practice tu so weird one. Mana ada orang zaman sekarang still percaya macam tu.
reason: Mocks religious practices as weird and outdated using casual code-switching, dismissing believers' faith in a provocative way.
suggested_rewrite: Every religion has its own traditions. Even if we find them unfamiliar, we should respect the faith of others.

input_text: Someone tolong share sampai si Aminah Bte Hassan tu delete akaun dia. She deserves to be cancelled. Tak sedar diri punya orang.
reason: Organizes cancellation campaign against a named individual using code-switched language, constituting targeted online harassment.
suggested_rewrite: If someone posts something problematic, report it through the platform. Organizing mass harassment campaigns is not the right approach.

input_text: I heard from reliable source, diorang tengah plan something kat area KL during the long weekend. Better be careful guys.
reason: Spreads vague unverified security threat attributed to a group in a mixed language post, designed to create communal suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: If you have credible security concerns, report directly to police at 999. Jangan sebarkan amaran tanpa bukti yang sahih.

input_text: That menteri tu memang bodoh gila. Of course la, kaum dia memang macam tu. Harap connection je, no brain one.
reason: Insults a minister and links their perceived incompetence to their entire ethnic group, combining personal abuse with racial stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Ministers should be evaluated based on their policies and performance, not their ethnic background. Criticism should be specific and constructive.

input_text: Area Kepong tu sekarang dah macam bukan Malaysia dah. Semua signboard pun their language. Kita yang jadi outsider kat own country.
reason: Frames the presence of multilingual signage in a neighborhood as evidence of national displacement, promoting xenophobic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Signage regulations are managed by local councils. Multilingual signage reflects Malaysia's diversity, though compliance with official language requirements should be ensured.

input_text: Scammer tu I ada partial IC number dia. 85XXXX-XX-XXXX. Tinggal somewhere around Subang area. Please help viral this.
reason: Shares partial IC number and approximate location of an alleged scammer, constituting privacy leakage that could be used to identify the person.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been scammed, lodge a police report with all evidence. Sharing someone's IC number online is a privacy violation and may be illegal.

input_text: Lepas election ni, kalau party tu menang, kita sendiri kena take action la. Tak boleh harap system lagi dah. Organize our own way.
reason: Calls for extralegal action if elections don't go a certain way, suggesting organized response outside democratic and legal channels.
suggested_rewrite: Election results should be respected. If there are concerns about the process, they can be raised through legal channels like election petitions.

input_text: Diorang punya wedding ah, so noisy and messy one. Always block the road. Very inconsiderate culture la honestly.
reason: Disparages an entire community's wedding customs as inconsiderate, generalizing negative traits to their entire culture.
suggested_rewrite: Road closures for events can be inconvenient. These issues can be resolved through proper permits and coordination with local authorities.

input_text: That NGO activist, dia tinggal area PJ somewhere near Section 17. Kalau jumpa dia, confront her about her lies.
reason: Shares approximate home location of an activist and encourages physical confrontation, combining doxxing with targeted intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Disagree with an activist? Engage through proper debate or formal complaints. Revealing personal locations and encouraging confrontation is dangerous.

input_text: Parents group kata ada suspicious people dari community tu kat school area. Be extra careful, jangan biarkan anak jalan sorang-sorang.
reason: Spreads unverified safety concern from a parents group linking suspicious activity to a specific community near schools, inciting communal fear.
suggested_rewrite: Child safety is important. If you notice suspicious activity, report to police immediately. Avoid spreading unverified rumors that target any community.

input_text: Diorang tu memang tak appreciate this country pun. Cakap mother tongue je, tak nak integrate. Balik la kalau tak suka.
reason: Tells a community to leave the country for speaking their native language, combining xenophobic sentiment with exclusionary demands.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multilingual nation. Language diversity is part of our heritage. Integration happens through mutual respect, not forced assimilation.

input_text: Ustaz yang viral tu memang fake one. Agama dia pun dia tak faham, nak ajar orang pulak. These religious people semua hypocrite.
reason: Attacks a religious figure and generalizes all religious people as hypocrites using code-switched language, combining personal targeting with religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: If a religious figure spreads inaccurate teachings, concerns can be raised with the relevant religious authority. Generalizing about all religious people is unfair.

input_text: Kaum tu kan, semua masuk government sector sebab nak senang. Private sector taknak because not competitive enough la. That's why country tak maju.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group as uncompetitive and blames them for national underperformance through code-switched communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Public sector employment patterns are influenced by many factors. National development requires inclusive policies rather than blaming any community.
